meaning: This is not a new IR and it does not mutate HIVM. It is the checklist/mutation-plan layer between selected_plan.json and HivmOpsEditor.

sync_plan_readiness.purpose: 把粗粒度 barrier/pipe barrier 转成更细粒度的 set_flag/wait_flag，或者删除冗余同步。

tiling_plan_readiness.purpose: 把 tile_m/tile_n/tile_k 从策略参数推进到 Linux backend 可检查的 loop split、index remap、load/store slice、tail mask dry-run 计划。

conventional_tensor_signature.note: name-based conventional tensor signature; used as evidence only, not a hard-coded kernel family

notes: name/shape evidence only; backend must confirm exact indexing maps and logical axes
axis evidence is sufficient for Linux anchor validation, not sufficient for production loop rewrite

parameter_readiness.meaning: loop split on M + load/store/compute slice request
loop split on N + load/store/compute slice request
reduction-loop split + partial accumulation proof request
loop permutation legality check; mutation deferred
tail guard/mask semantics check; mutation deferred
reduction accumulation policy check; mutation deferred

must_prove_before_mutate: MLIR parser can resolve the recorded loop/compute/load/store anchors
backend can map logical M/N/K axes to actual induction variables and indexing maps
backend can materialize loop split without changing tensor semantics
backend can rewrite load/store slices and compute shapes consistently
tail mask or padding semantics are explicit and verified
reduction partial accumulation is preserved for tile_k changes
roundtrip + verifier pass after a guarded single-parameter mutation
linux_validation_commands: # then on Linux backend: run inventory/roundtrip/verify before enabling any loop/index mutation
tiling_plan_readiness.claim_boundary: ready for Linux backend anchor/dry-run validation; not a Python production operation rewrite

recommended_next_backend_milestone.name: SyncPlan + MultiBufferPlan backend dry-run
recommended_next_backend_milestone.why: SyncPlan is the safest first true rewrite; MultiBuffer buffer clone is the necessary foundation for CVPipeline overlap.
recommended_next_backend_milestone.requires_user_run_when: Only when compiling/running real vTriton/HivmOpsEditor backend.
